task.zh: 抛10次硬币！你觉得正面会出现几次？先猜一猜，再实验看看！
task.en: Flip a coin 10 times! How many heads do you think? Guess first, then experiment!

question.zh: 你觉得10次抛硬币，正面会出现几次？
question.en: How many heads do you think will appear in 10 flips?

hints.zh: 硬币有两面，每次都是一半一半的机会
hints.en: A coin has 2 sides — it's a 50-50 chance each time

hints.zh: 10次的话，大概5次正面，但不是每次都刚好
hints.en: In 10 flips, roughly 5 heads — but not always exact
